caption: A news broadcast titled "PLUS POLITICS" features a male presenter in a dark suit, white shirt, and purple tie, wearing glasses and speaking to the camera. He is positioned against a digital blue background with circular patterns. Beside him, a small inset window displays a man wearing a red traditional cap, identified by the on-screen text "ON THE PHONE," "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI," "POLITICAL ANALYST," and "LAGOS." A prominent white banner at the bottom of the screen reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." Across the frames, the presenter remains in the same position and attire, and the guest in the inset window remains static. The lower portion of the screen displays a red and white bar with "SUBSCRIBE" and a YouTube link "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE" alongside "FOLLOW US" and social media icons. The final frames add a footer showing "WATCH ON" followed by logos for "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308."
